feed.title: STUF - Language Typology and Universals...
feed.subtitle: Latest articles from STUF - Language Typology and Universals... (De Gruyter)

entry.title: Rediscovering Papuan languages in New Ireland
entry.summary: Authors: Christoph Holz DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/stuf-2026-3001 Pages: Page range: 147-190

entry.title: Dead and dying duals meet the Agreement Hierarchy: Upper Sorbian clarifies the nature of ‘semantic agreement’
entry.summary: Authors: Greville G. Corbett, Leńka Šołćic DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/stuf-2026-3002 Pages: Page range: 191-207

entry.title: -bɔ/-baconstruction in Assamese: its synchrony and diachrony
entry.summary: Authors: Gitanjali Bez DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/stuf-2026-3003 Pages: Page range: 209-260
